delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Ceded Unpaid Claim Liabilities' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '14%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Gross Unpaid Claim Liabilities' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '20%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'RBP' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '22%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Ceded Case Oustanding' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '141%' or GL like '142%' or GL like '144%')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Ceded IBNR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '143%' or GL like '145%' or GL like '146%' or GL like '147%')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Gross Case Oustanding' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '201%' or GL like '202%' or GL like '204%')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Gross IBNR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '203%' or GL like '205%' or GL like '206%' or GL like '207%')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'RBP' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '22%'
update TransX set Flex3 = '1 Beginning of year' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '100'
update TransX set Flex3 = '2 Foreign exchange' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY like '99%'
update TransX set Flex3 = '2 Foreign exchange' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY like '99%'
update TransX set Flex3 = '3 Provision - prior year' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '821'
update TransX set Flex3 = '4 Provision - curr year' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '822'
update TransX set Flex3 = '5 Paid - curr year' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '824'
update TransX set Flex3 = '6 Paid - prior year' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '823'
update TransX set Flex3 = '7 Acquisition' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '815'
update TransX set Flex3 = '8 Otherr' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex4 = 'I/C' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP like 'F%'
update TransX set Flex4 = '3rd Party' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 is NULL
update TransX set Flex4 = '3rds reclass' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'F0020' and Ledger = 'IF'
update TransX set Flex4 = '3rds reclass' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP in ('F0075','F0080') and Ledger = 'UG' and not Flex1 = 'RBP'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, GLdesc, PC, PCdesc, Hierarchy, TP, TPname, TTY, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Amt1) (select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, 'adj' as Co,' adj' as GL, 'Gulf RBP' as GLdesc, 'adj' as PC, 'adj' as PCdesc, 'adj' as Hierarchy, 'adj' as TP, 'adj' as TPname, '824' as TTY, 'Gross Unpaid Claim Liabilities' as Flex1, 'adj' as Flex2, '5 Paid - curr year' as Flex3, '3rd Party' as Flex4, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and TP in ('F0075','F0080') and Flex1 = 'RBP' group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, GLdesc, PC, PCdesc, Hierarchy, TP, TPname, TTY, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Amt1) (select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co,GL, GLdesc, PC, PCdesc, Hierarchy, TP, TPname, TTY, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, 'I/C' as Flex4, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GLdesc = 'Gulf RBP')
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, TTY, TP, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
